rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALETTA MARIE LURIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/4/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The proposed distribution shown in paragraph 32 does not reflect the $500 reserve mentioned in paragraph 28 and in the prayer. (2) Paragraph 16 does not address whether cash was invested in an interest-bearing account. [Probate Code Section 9652.] (3) Paragraph 21 refers to expenses requested in "Paragraph 36 and Paragraph 37"...? (4) Mandatory Judicial Council form DE-300 is required to be attached to a 13100 affidavit for a decedent dying on or after 4/1/22 (Hugo Rupert Leuner). Please a courtesy copy of the amendment to the amended petition to the assigned examiner by 2/23/24. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (The correct form of proof of service is the one on the reverse side of the mandatory Judicial Council form. If a pleading form of proof of service is used, a copy of the Notice of Hearing that was served must be attached to it. There is no need to file the pleading form of proof of service if the correct one has been filed.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CATHI ANN COCHRANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The Court is to consider whether to take this petition off calendar for lack of satisfactory progress, as nothing has been filed to address the following issues (see tentative rulings for past hearings - also e-mailed to petitioner in pro per on 10/10/2023): 1) No proposed order (DE-226 form) has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-120 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 3) Item 4c of the petition: At least one box must be checked. 4) Item 7: i) Attachment 7 must be filed to allege facts in support of property characterization. For community property, allegations required by LRSF 14.26(A) must be included. ii) Attachment 7a must be filed. The property determined to be passing to the petitioner must be described. Property characterization (decedent's separate property, her ½ share of community property, or both) must also be alleged. 5) Item 9: i) Please provide the names and dates of death of the decedent's parents. ii) Is Candy Hirsch the only sibling the decedent ever had? 6) If the vehicle is the only property subject to this petition, please explain why you are not proceeding with the affidavit procedure under Vehicle Code section 5910 (affidavit for transfer without probate). PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: **WILL TRANSFERRED TO SOLONO COUNTY** THE ESTATE OF ROBERTO LOPEZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 3/11/24. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) How is this the proper venue when the decedent lived and died in Solano County and it appears that there is just personal property, regardless of the source of such property? (2) If the petitioner is the trustee of the devisee trust, all trust beneficiaries must be clearly identified and must receive notice. (Witnesses to a will are not required to be listed in a petition for probate or be given notice.) Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 3/1/24 (unless the petition is withdrawn). Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
